title: DEKTON POZI VDE Screwdriver PZ1X100MM – VDE Tested to 1000V | EN IEC 60900:2018 Certified | Insulated Sheath for Electrical Safety | Chrome Vanadium Shaft | Corrosion-Resistant Tip | Ergonomic Handle
features: Tested To 1000V & VDE Certified – This Screwdriver Is VDE Approved To EN IEC 60900:2018 Standard, Ensuring Maximum Safety For Electrical Work. Reliable For Professional Electricians And DIY Users, It Is Designed To Handle Live Circuits With Confidence And Peace Of Mind.

Insulated Sheath For Safety – Built With A Fully Insulated Sheath Running Along The Length Of The Bar To Protect Against Live Current. Provides Extra Safety During Household Or Commercial Electrical Installations, Making It Essential For All Safe Electrical Work.

Durable Chrome Vanadium Shaft – Constructed From Tough Chrome Vanadium Steel With A Corrosion-Resistant Tip For Long-Lasting Performance. Designed To Withstand Heavy Use Without Wearing Out, Ensuring Reliability And Durability Over Time.

Ergonomic Dual-Colour Handle – Features An Easy-To-Identify Dual-Colour Handle With A Non-Slip Grip For Excellent Control. The Ergonomic Design Reduces Hand Fatigue And Improves Work Efficiency, Making It Perfect For Frequent Electrical Maintenance.

Ideal For Electrical Circuits – A Practical Tool For Electricians, Engineers, And DIY Enthusiasts. Perfect For Household Circuits And Professional Jobs. Engineered For Safety, Comfort, And Performance, This Screwdriver Is Built To Meet Everyday Electrical Needs.
description: DEKTON POZI VDE SCREWDRIVER PZ1X100MM – The Dekton Pozi VDE Screwdriver PZ1x100mm Is A Professional-Quality Tool Built For Safety, Reliability, And Durability When Working On Electrical Circuits. Tested To 1000V And VDE™ Certified To EN IEC 60900:2018, It Guarantees Protection In High-Voltage Environments. The Fully Insulated Sheath Runs Along The Bar, Providing Added Protection Against Live Current. Its Tough Chrome Vanadium Shaft And Corrosion-Resistant Tip Ensure Long-Lasting Strength And Dependable Use. Designed With An Ergonomic Dual-Colour Handle, It Offers A Secure, Non-Slip Grip That Reduces Hand Fatigue While Giving You Greater Precision And Control. Easy To Identify In Your Toolbox, This Screwdriver Is An Ideal Choice For Both Professional Electricians And DIY Enthusiasts. Whether For Household Electrical Circuits Or Commercial Installations, The Dekton Pozi VDE Screwdriver Delivers Outstanding Safety, Performance, And Comfort.
